passives.name: Counter Attack
passives.description: Retaliate with a strike after surviving a hit.

passives.name: Spell Ward
passives.description: 25% of hostile spells fizzle on you.

passives.name: Thorns
passives.description: Attackers take 20% of their damage back.

passives.name: Lifedrink
passives.description: Heal 15% of the physical damage you deal.

passives.name: Clarity
passives.description: +3 MP each round; immune to Silence.

passives.name: Iron Will
passives.description: Survive a lethal blow at 1 HP once a battle.

passives.name: First Strike
passives.description: Act first in round 1; +50% on your first hit.

passives.name: Bodyguard
passives.description: Take 25% of hits aimed at your weakest ally.

passives.name: Keen Senses
passives.description: Immune to Blind; +10% vs debuffed foes.
